role: Deputy Prime Minister (1979); Iran's longest-held political prisoner
bio: Head of Political Office of the [Freedom Movement of Iran](/orgs/freedom-movement-of-iran) (1978–1979). Served as deputy prime minister and government spokesman in [Bazargan](/people/mehdi-bazargan)'s provisional government. Arrested in 1981 on espionage charges widely considered politically motivated. Spent over 20 years in prison, making him Iran's longest-held political prisoner. Released on medical leave in 2010. Died 11 August 2018.
editorial_notes: Iran's longest-held political prisoner. Over 20 years imprisoned. Died 2018.
